priority_basis: The highest-priority frontier handoff required inspecting the pending clean-runner gate. Inspection found that the workflow referenced a nonexistent module and omitted the actual durability modules, making the gate non-executable as written.
completed: Replaced the stale workflow path with the actual durable journal and filesystem terminal-store modules.
Expanded path filters and syntax checks to cover the full durability dependency chain.
Added a deterministic workflow contract test for file existence, stale-path rejection, test invocation, least privilege, and immutable action pinning.
Recorded source status, uncertainty, evidence strength, privacy boundary, and falsification routes.
verification: Repository source inspection confirms the corrected bindings and committed regression test. No GitHub Actions run was returned for the newest commit, so hosted runtime success is not claimed.
next_action: Obtain the first clean-runner result for the corrected workflow. If green, implement process-level crash injection around pre-rename termination, post-rename pre-directory-sync termination, and lock-release recovery.
